summary: Classified the maintainer-ready PR shard without GitHub mutation. No merge action is safe from the provided artifact because every open PR lacks a complete merge preflight/Codex review, and several have high-risk labels or failing relevant checks. Security-sensitive linked refs are quarantined individually; no executable fix artifact is emitted because the viable repairs are either existing contributor PRs needing maintainer/review-gate finalization or are blocked by merge-risk labels.
